citation.description: Completion evidence comment in the epic ticket (2026-07-16) names all five children: footed-semiacidic-sable (08a8), indigoid-flirty-catbird (21dd), gimmicky-troubling-takin (36c7), ducal-statuelike-ladybird (6168), clippable-convulsive-eft (fd84) — all listed as 'closed, completion-verifier signed/CERTIFIED this session'. All five implementations are present in the codebase (compat.py, _deprecations.py, release.yml, hatch_build.py, release_guards.py), corroborating the attestation.

criteria.criterion: All five child stories are closed.

citation.description: Completion evidence comment provides: 08a8 → change 709 (merged); 6168 → change 719 + follow-up 725 (LLM-Review+1 rebar-review-bot, Verified+1 CI run 29459823729, MERGED); fd84 → change 729 (LLM-Review+1 @ 2026-07-16T01:41:02Z, Verified+1 @ 2026-07-16T01:43:29Z CI run 29464320181, MERGED to main tip 22d4c788a). Session log (b151) confirms 703/704 landed atomically. The codebase (current HEAD) contains all five implementations.

criteria.criterion: Each child story's change has landed on main through the Gerrit two-vote gate (LLM-Review +1 AND Verified +1).

citation.description: check_store_compat() exists; wired into lock.acquire() (lock.py:296), fsck_recover.py:136, and reconcile.py:800 (_apply_mutations). All mutation write paths gated.

criteria.criterion: The store-compatibility gate (Finding 2) is present in the tree that ships as v1.0 (verified by the reader existing and being wired into the write paths).

citation.description: docs/migrations.md section 'The committed store-compat record + fail-closed gate' documents all four record states (ABSENT=implicit legacy pass-through, PRESENT+compatible, PRESENT+incompatible=fail-closed, PRESENT+corrupt=fail-closed), the ensure unit auto-stamping, and explicit rollback safety. compat.py code matches.

criteria.criterion: The Finding 2 story defines and documents the absent-record (pre-v1.0 store) policy — absent = legacy/compatible, record auto-written by the ensure-registry on next covered write, fail-closed only when present-but-incompatible — and a rollback-safe outcome for a pre-v1.0 binary encountering the record.

citation.description: docs/releasing.md has 'Release-source authorization' (dispatch-from-main, 4 guards) and 'Build-once' sections. docs/migrations.md has full store compat record documentation. Together the two docs cover all three required topics per their respective scopes (as the epic assigns: auth+build-once→releasing.md; store compat→migrations.md).

criteria.criterion: docs/releasing.md and docs/migrations.md are updated to describe the new release-authorization gate, the build-once artifact flow, and the store compatibility record (including the absent-record upgrade/rollback path).

citation.description: Session log (b151) records dispositions for each story: '21dd advisory dispositions recorded as comment (7 accepted/reflected, 10 rejected w/ rationale)'; '36c7 advisory dispositions recorded (1 rejected)'; '08a8 claimed + advisories dispositioned'; completion evidence comment confirms 'fd84: round-4 PASS, 20 advisories dispositioned (Accept/Reject + rationale) in a comment on clippable-convulsive-eft; Accepted findings reflected in the description before its Gerrit votes; plan-review attestation certified pre-claim.' All five stories covered.

criteria.criterion: Each child story's plan-review advisory findings are recorded with an explicit Accept/Reject disposition and a one-line rationale (as a comment on the child ticket), and every Accepted finding is reflected in the child's description before that child's change receives its Gerrit LLM-Review +1 / Verified +1 votes.
